name: PAY_MIG_STAGING_ELEMENTS
description: This table contains information that is useful for element migration itself and related areas. It contains a mapping between a PeopleSoft earning or deduction and the Fusion element that it will be migrated to. It contains the status of the migration, including whether an element should be migrated and has been migrated successfully. It also contains information that is common between all elements, such as the primary classifications and the legislative data group.

columns.Name: STAGING_ELEMENTS_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key.

columns.Name: TRANSFERRED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the associated definition has been either transferred via template or created manually by customer. We cannot re-run for any that have been transferred already.

columns.Name: MIGRATE_DEFINITION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates that the user wishes to transfer the earning.

columns.Name: DEFINITION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates if this is an earnings or deduction definition.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ELEMENT_NAME
columns.Comments: Populated with whatever is considered the unique name of the earnings definition.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ELEMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Will be populated with the identifier of the PeopleSoft source definition record.

columns.Name: SOURCE_SHORT_DESC
columns.Comments: Value from PeopleSoft database. Not relevant for GPUK.

columns.Name: SOURCE_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Value from PeopleSoft database.

columns.Name: ELEMENT_NAME
columns.Comments:
Name of element to create on fusion.
(PAY_ELEMENT_TYPES_F.BASE_ELEMENT_NAME).

columns.Name: ELEMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key ID of element created (PAY_ELEMENT_TYPES_F.ELEMENT_TYPE_ID). This will be populated when the element is actually created on the Fusion system. It is intended to make it easy to map between the PeopleSoft and Fusion definitions.

columns.Name: REPORTING_NAME
columns.Comments: The reporting name of the created element.

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_NAME
columns.Comments: Legislative data group name that element will belong to.

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUPS.

columns.Name: PRIMARY_CLASSIFICATION_NAME
columns.Comments: Primary classification name that element will belong to.

columns.Name: PRIMARY_CLASSIFICATION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PAY_ELE_CLASSIFICATIONS.CLASSIFICATION_ID (for a primary classification, i.e. where PAY_ELE_CLASSIFICATIONS.PARENT_CLASSIFICATION_ID is NULL).

columns.Name: SECONDARY_CLASSIFICATION_NAME
columns.Comments: Secondary classification name that element will belong to.

columns.Name: SECONDARY_CLASSIFICATION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PAY_ELE_CLASSIFICATIONS.CLASSIFICATION_ID.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Description of element to create on fusion.

columns.Name: INPUT_CURRENCY_CODE
columns.Comments: Input currency for the element.

columns.Name: OUTPUT_CURRENCY_CODE
columns.Comments: Output currency for the element.

columns.Name: STANDARD_LINK_FLAG
columns.Comments: This sets the PAY_ELEMENT_TYPES_F.STANDARD_LINK_FLAG (which would also default PAY_ELEMENT_LINKS_F.STANDARD_LINK_FLAG).

columns.Name: STARTING_TIME_DEF_SHORT_CODE
columns.Comments: Starting time definition short code value. Equivalent to PAY_TIME_DEFINITIONS.SHORT_NAME.

columns.Name: STARTING_TIME_DEF_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key reference to PAY_TIME_DEFINITIONS.TIME_DEFINITION_ID.

columns.Name: ENDING_TIME_DEF_SHORT_CODE
columns.Comments: Ending time definition short code value. Equivalent to PAY_TIME_DEFINITIONS.SHORT_NAME.

columns.Name: ENDING_TIME_DEF_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key reference to PAY_TIME_DEFINITIONS.TIME_DEFINITION_ID.

columns.Name: EMPLOYMENT_LEVEL
columns.Comments: Which level in three tier model will entries for this definition be attached.

columns.Name: PROCESSING_TYPE
columns.Comments: Recurring (R) or non-recurring (N) definition.

columns.Name: ONCE_EACH_PERIOD_FLAG
columns.Comments: Processed only once per period?

columns.Name: MULTIPLE_ENTRIES_ALLOWED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Whether or not more than one entry for this definition can exist over same span of time.

columns.Name: INVOL_DEDUCTION_CODE
columns.Comments: The PeopleSoft involuntary deduction code. If set, indicates the definition is to be used for voluntary deduction mapping for a particular deduction type.

columns.Name: PLAN_TYPE
columns.Comments: Required for PNA migration.

columns.Name: DED_CLASS
columns.Comments: Required for PNA migration.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES.
